evaluators.name: Cheapest Weekend Adult Beginner Class Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked an adult beginner group class this coming weekend at or after 5:00 PM under $35, and whether the booked class is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Cheapest 4+ Sessions Membership Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user viewed all qualifying (>=4 group sessions/month) membership plans, submitted an inquiry for a qualifying plan, and whether that inquiry is for the cheapest such plan.

evaluators.name: Next Wednesday Indoor Hard Doubles Court Reservation Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user reserved an indoor hard court next Wednesday from 7:00 PM to 8:30 PM for doubles and added that reservation to the cart.

evaluators.name: Earliest Weekday 4pm+ Backhand Specialist Private Lesson Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a weekday private lesson starting at or after 4:00 PM with a 4.5+ rated coach who specializes in backhand, and whether it is the earliest such available slot.

evaluators.name: July Morning Half-Day Camp Enrollment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user enrolled a 10-year-old child in a July morning half-day camp week suitable for their age with a price between $280 and $300, and added that enrollment to the cart.

evaluators.name: Three-Day Adult Intermediate Weekly Training Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added one adult intermediate cardio, one strategy, and one match play group session in the same upcoming week on three different days, and whether at least one such combination in the cart has a total price under $120.

evaluators.name: Next-Month Earliest 3.0–3.5 Singles Tournament Registration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for the singles 3.0–3.5 event at the first upcoming tournament next month that offers such a bracket, and added that registration to the cart.

evaluators.name: Featured Serve & Injury Prevention Articles Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved one featured serve-technique article and one featured injury-prevention article to their reading list.
